headline: Cryptocurrency Trading Volumes Hit RM28 Billion in Malaysia
context: SC data shows Malaysian cryptocurrency trading reached RM28 billion in 2025 across 4 licensed exchanges.

cards.big: Crypto trading hit RM28 billion across 4 licensed Malaysian exchanges
cards.sub: SC tightened rules after RM680 million losses from unlicensed platforms

cards.big: Luno Tokenize and 2 others serve 3.8 million registered accounts
cards.sub: Average holder aged 28 with RM4,200 in cryptocurrency holdings

cards.big: SC blocked access to 45 unlicensed platforms operating offshore
cards.sub: Investors lost RM680 million to scams and collapses on unlicensed exchanges

cards.big: Bank Negara maintained ban on crypto as legal tender despite exchange trading
cards.sub: Central bank studying CBDC with digital ringgit pilot expected late 2027

cards.big: Crypto regulation tests whether investor protection can keep pace with financial innovation
RM28 billion crypto volume — regulation must protect consumers without pushing activity to unregulated platforms.
